step_rationale: Phosphatidylserine with arachidonic acid; lipid metabolism marker; PS externalization marks platelet and endothelial activation.
mechanism: Phosphatidylserine lipid species reflects membrane remodeling and phosphatidylserine exposure during platelet activation and endothelial injury.

references.title: Exploring the mechanism underlying the cardioprotective effect of shexiang baoxin pill on acute myocardial infarction rats by comprehensive metabolomics.
